heading: Add Project Access from a Project
body:
To create a service account for a project using the Atlas UI:

- Enter a Name.

- Enter a Description.

- Select a duration from the Client Secret Expiration menu.

- From the **Project Permissions** menu, select the
  [project role](project-roles) for the
  service account.

The client secret acts as the password when creating access tokens.

> **Warning:** *This is the only time you can view the full client secret.* Click
> Copy and save it to a secure location. Otherwise, you'll need to
> generate a new client secret.

- Click Add Access List Entry.

- Enter an IP (Internet Protocol) address or CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block from which you want Atlas
  to accept API (Application Programming Interface) requests for this service account.

  You can also click Use Current IP Address if the host
  you are using to access Atlas will also make API (Application Programming Interface) requests
  using this service account.

- Click Save.
